caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional condenser microphone mounted on a boom arm, which features the legible text " Rode NT1-A". Behind him is a dark gray wall covered in acoustic foam panels with a ribbed texture. A tattoo is partially visible on his right arm. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, and his facial expression shifts slightly as his mouth opens and closes to form words. He maintains a steady gaze forward while leaning toward the microphone, with very little movement in his posture or the surrounding equipment throughout the clip.
